# Book Hypermarket

> The premier online clearinghouse for book price comparisons, rare collectibles, and independent bookstore discovery.

## Core Services
- Live ISBN and Title Price Tracking across Waterstones, Blackwells, Amazon, and Bookshop.org
- Curated genre spotlights supporting independent brick-and-mortar bookshops
- Antiquarian, first-edition, and rare sci-fi book discovery

## Key Links
- Storefront: https://bookhypermarket.com/
- Trusted Partners: https://bookhypermarket.com/partners
- Retailer Integration: https://bookhypermarket.com/retailers
